headline: Quiet competitor week, regulatory clock ticks toward 1 April mandates.
why_it_moved: Score moved because: 3 regulatory deadlines within 90 days

regulatory.title: GST e-invoicing April 2026 mandate finalising — ₹5cr threshold, 30-day reporting, MFA
regulatory.summary: Final-week run-up to GST e-invoicing changes — lower turnover threshold to ₹5cr, mandatory 30-day reporting window for IRP uploads, MFA enforcement on the portal.

regulatory.title: InvoiceNow becomes mandatory for new voluntary GST registrants (1 April)
regulatory.summary: InvoiceNow becomes mandatory for new voluntary GST registrants in Singapore from 1 April 2026, with extension to all GST-registered businesses by April 2031.

regulatory.title: South Africa enacts legal framework for e-invoicing under VAT Act
regulatory.summary: Tax Administration Laws Amendment Act 2026 — legal framework for e-invoicing and e-reporting, effective 1 April 2026.
